nav.brand_full: Hainan Mito Transport Intelligence Co., Ltd.

hero.title_l1: Make airline commercial operations more real-time and controllable
hero.desc: Mito Aero provides revenue management, pricing, network planning, operations control, distribution, NDC / One Order and data intelligence solutions, designed to integrate with PSS, GDS and NDC ecosystems.
hero.badge: Rooted in Hainan FTZ · Serving airlines worldwide

kpi.title: Built to scale with every flight
kpi.desc: Composable modules for full-service, hybrid and low-cost carriers — from a single product to end-to-end platform transformation.

solutions.title: Six core solutions for airline commercial operations
solutions.desc: Modular solutions across revenue, pricing, network, operations, distribution and data intelligence, extended with NDC, One Order and disruption support capabilities.

rm.title: Revenue Management
rm.desc: AI-driven RMS with elasticity, demand forecasting and dynamic pricing — optimise every flight, every day.

pricing.title: Pricing Management
pricing.desc: End-to-end fare filing, multi-channel distribution and rule configuration with real-time monitoring.

network.title: Network Planning
network.desc: Schedule optimisation and capacity planning powered by data and operations science.

ops.title: Operations Control
ops.desc: Unified flight operations platform for planning, monitoring, disruption and recovery.

retail.title: Distribution & e-Commerce
retail.desc: B2C / B2B / group sales solutions across mobile and web, with ancillaries and lifecycle management.

data.title: Data Platform & Intelligence
data.desc: Unifies flight, fare, order, inventory, channel and operations data to support analytics and forecasting across revenue, network and operations teams.

oneorder.title: One Order management
oneorder.desc: A unified data model for the entire order lifecycle — booking, re-issue, refund, irregular events — under a single order ID. The foundation capability for NDC. Available with all major airline systems.

ndc.title: NDC API sales service
ndc.desc: IATA NDC-compliant distribution with both XML and JSON bindings. Supports NDC Tier 1 / 2 / 3 capabilities, rich media, offer management — opens the door to direct channels.

irregular.title: Irregular-ops recovery
irregular.desc: End-to-end automation for delay / cancellation / diversion / missed-connection: entitlements, re-accommodation, hotels & ground-handling, refunds. Average recovery time down 60%.

tech.title: A technology foundation for evolving airline business systems
tech.desc: Cloud-native, microservices-based, open API and forecasting / optimization capabilities that coexist with PSS, GDS, NDC and One Order ecosystems.

cloud.title: Cloud-native
cloud.desc: Containerised microservices with elastic scaling and 24×7 reliability.

ai.title: Forecasting & Optimization
ai.desc: Configurable and explainable models for demand forecasting, price elasticity, inventory control, route revenue evaluation and disruption recovery.

api.title: Open APIs & SDKs
api.desc: REST and GraphQL — embed into your digital storefront and mobile apps.

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.desc: ISO 27001 / SOC 2 processes. SaaS or self-hosted deployment.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem
ecosystem.desc: Integrated with leading GDS, PSS and NDC aggregators.

demo.title: Revenue forecast and pricing recommendation demo
demo.desc: Using a PEK-SHA route example, the demo shows how demand, inventory and fare rules become actionable revenue recommendations.
demo.cmd4: Suggestion: Raise M class 5%, tighten discount cabins

customers.title: Customers & Partners
customers.desc: Trusted by network carriers, hybrid carriers, LCCs and charter operators — from single-module to full-platform partnerships.

t1.quote: After Mito's pricing system went live, our pricing team moved from weekly price updates to on-demand real-time pricing — the change in the revenue curve was visible to the eye.
t1.name: L.

t2.quote: Their network optimization team truly understands how Chinese airlines structure their networks — they gave us an executable, continuously updated slot recommendation.
t2.name: Z.

t3.quote: As a hybrid airline, we care most about go-live speed and controllable cost. Mito's modular delivery fit perfectly.
t3.name: W.

customers.cases_title: How customers create value with Mito

c1.headline: From weekly pricing cycles to on-demand real-time response
c1.summary: After deploying the revenue forecast and pricing-integration modules, the team shifted from "watching dashboards" to "making decisions." Hours saved each month translate to three new routes flown.

c2.headline: Added 7 new flights during peak slots at 5 airports
c2.summary: The network planning team adopted Mito's algorithmic suggestions as a standing weekly agenda item — within six months, slot resources shifted from supply-driven to market-driven.

c3.headline: 8x peak order capacity
c3.summary: Holiday promotions no longer trigger emergency war rooms. The cloud-native architecture and unified channels let the operations team enjoy the holiday for the first time.

about.title: About Mito
about.heading: Rooted in Hainan, focused on aviation
about.p1: Hainan Mito Transport Intelligence Co., Ltd. (Mito), founded January 2025, is an innovative technology company headquartered in Haikou, in the core area of the Hainan Free Trade Zone.
about.p2: We ride the strategic momentum of Hainan to digitalise and intelligentise industry — striving to be the leading technology services provider in transportation and travel.
about.p3: We deliver consultancy, planning and IT implementation for aviation market and data businesses — helping airlines maximise commercial value.

v1.title: Expertise
v1.desc: 90%+ of our team comes from aviation, with 10+ years on average.

v2.title: Agility
v2.desc: Scrum + DevOps — ship a module in 2–4 weeks.

v3.title: Long-termism
v3.desc: We build systems meant to compound over 10 years.

team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: A cross-functional team with deep aviation expertise and solid engineering, rooted in the Hainan FTP, serving global civil aviation.

pm.label: Senior product managers
pm.desc: From airlines, CAICT, and leading SaaS

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing, Clear Delivery
pricing.desc: Flexible pricing models and quantifiable delivery commitments — every dollar delivers measurable value.

p1.title: Modular Subscription
p1.desc: Pick the modules you need, subscribe annually, no hidden fees. Start with one module and scale anytime.

p2.title: 3-Month Go-Live Guarantee
p2.desc: Standard modules deployed within 3 months, or the first year's service fee is waived. We stand behind our delivery.

p3.title: Dedicated Customer Success Manager
p3.desc: Every client gets a dedicated CSM with regular business metric reviews to ensure continuous value.
